title: ETOS Suite Definition
description: Schema for the ETOS test suite YAML format (v1alpha1). Defines one or more test suites with their test executions, environments, and dependencies.

suites.description: List of test suites to execute.

suite.description: A single test suite containing prioritized test executions.

priority.description: Execution priority when multiple suites are defined. Lower values indicate higher priority.

test_executions.description: List of test executions within this suite.

test_execution.description: A single test execution combining a test case, its execution instructions, and environment requirements.

id.description: Unique identifier for this test execution.

dependencies.description: Optional list of test execution IDs that must complete before this test can run.

items.description: ID of a test execution this test depends on.

testcase.description: Metadata about the test case. The repository and version can be used to check out the test source code.

id.description: Fully qualified test case identifier, e.g. 'tests/integration/test_api.py::TestAPI::test_create_resource'.

version.description: Version of the test case, typically a Git commit SHA or branch name.

repository.description: URI of the source repository containing the test case, e.g. a Git repository URL.

uri.description: Documentation or external reference URI for the test case.

execution.description: Instructions for how to execute the test case.

checkout.description: Shell commands to check out the test source code. Executed in order before the test command.

command.description: The shell command to execute the test, e.g. a pytest invocation.

pre_execution.description: Shell commands to run after checkout but before the main test command (e.g. setup steps, dependency installation).

environment.description: Environment configuration for the test execution, including the test runner image, environment variables, additional devices, and sidecar containers.

test_runner.description: Container image to use as the test runner, e.g. 'ghcr.io/eiffel-community/etos-base-test-runner:latest'.

environment_variables.description: Key-value pairs of environment variables to set in the test runner.

extra_devices.description: Additional hardware devices required by the test beyond the primary IUT (Item Under Test).

containers.description: Sidecar containers to run alongside the test runner.

extra_device.description: An additional hardware device needed for the test.

software.description: Software artifact UUID to deploy on the device.

container.description: A sidecar container to run alongside the test runner.

image.description: Container image to run as a sidecar.

environment_variables.description: Environment variables for this sidecar container.
